content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad rally driven by US-Iran de-escalation hopes, crude below $100, and strong global cues (Nasdaq +2%). Sector breadth is wide — Financials, IT, Capital Goods, FMCG, Pharma, Defense all participating. Existing book is well-positioned to benefit; priority is locking in unrealized gains via SL trails rather than adding new size into an extended tape.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24100,
      "nifty_resistance": 24500
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Entry 984, CMP 1056.70 (+7.4%). SL already at 1035 (above entry, +5.2%). Trail rule (b): trail to max(entry, LTP-2%) = max(984, 1035.57) = 1035.57. Current SL 1035 is essentially at that level — no material change needed. Holding existing SL/target as it satisfies trail discipline (trail-gap ~2% below CMP). HOLD effectively."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Entry 125.10, CMP 124.12 (-0.8%). SL 121 holds. Gold acting as portfolio hedge; risk-on tape pressuring near-term but structural drivers intact. No trail action — position underwater; SL appropriate at -3.3%."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1720.00,
      "new_target": 1820.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Entry 1700, CMP 1757.10 (+3.4%). Trail rule (b): max(1700, 1757.10×0.98=1721.96). Trailing SL up from 1730 to 1720 — wait, 1720 is BELOW current SL 1730. Cannot loosen. Keeping SL at 1730 (already breakeven+). Actually keeping current SL 1730 — it's already optimally placed at +1.8% above entry, ~1.5% below CMP. NO-OP MODIFY would be wasted; emit HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Entry 4575, CMP 4630.40 (+1.2%). SL 4540 (-0.8% below entry, -2.0% below CMP). Trail-gap 2% — within tolerance. Not yet at +2% threshold for breakeven move. HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 6905.00,
      "new_target": 7400.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Entry 6900, CMP 7049 (+2.2%). Trail rule (a): at +2%, move SL to at least breakeven. Moving SL from 6900 to 6905 (just above entry, ~2.0% below CMP — satisfies 1% trail-gap floor). Tightens by 5pts (>0.5%? 5/6900=0.07%, marginal). Still meaningful as crosses BE threshold. Q4 stellar; CDMO momentum intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 836.00,
      "new_target": 900.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Entry 838, CMP 845.20 (+0.86%). Currently below +2% threshold. SL 830 (-0.95% below entry). Tightening to 836 still below entry but only -0.24% — wait, that loosens risk only marginally. Actually keeping SL 830 — not yet at trail trigger. Reverting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Override prior MODIFY: P&L only +0.86%, below +2% trail trigger. SL 830 remains appropriate (-1.0% from entry, -1.8% below CMP). HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 363.00,
      "new_target": 388.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "P&L was +6.6% intraday (CMP 368.70 vs entry 369). Wait — entry 369, CMP 368.70 = -0.08%. Day change +6.61% but entry was today. SL 363 (-1.6% below entry, -1.5% below CMP). Within tolerance. No-op MODIFY — should HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Entry 820, CMP 822.55 (+0.31%). Today's move already captured in entry. SL 815 (-0.6%, -0.9% below CMP). Below +2% trail trigger. ATH breakout post-Q4 stellar print, MOFSL TP 950. HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1253.00,
      "new_target": 1330.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Entry 1259, CMP 1279.10 (+1.6%). Below +2% trail trigger but close. Tightening SL from 1245 to 1253 (-0.5% below entry, -2.0% below CMP). Move is 8pts (~0.6% — above 0.5% floor). Strong Q4 beat (revenue +29%, margins +370bps), 10% UC yesterday. Locking risk closer to entry."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 2980.00,
      "new_target": 3225.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Entry 3025, CMP 3034 (+0.3%). Current SL 2990 — proposed 2980 is LOWER (loosens). Reject self-edit; revert to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Override: P&L only +0.3%. SL 2990 (-1.2% below entry, -1.4% below CMP) remains appropriate. Below trail trigger. HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 800.00,
      "new_target": 855.00,
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Entry 806, CMP 807.30 (+0.16%). SL 795. Tightening to 800 (-0.7% below entry, -0.9% below CMP). 5pt tighten = 0.6% (above floor). Q4 record EBITDA, dominant 68% MF RTA share. Locking risk closer."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HFCL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "MIS",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "timeframe": "INTRADAY",
      "reasoning": "Stale OPEN MIS BUY @ 133.50 placed 1796 minutes (~30 hrs) ago — this is from a prior session and should not be live. Cannot CANCEL via this schema; flagging in portfolio_notes. If still working, infrastructure issue."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.00,
      "reasoning": "SL 1035 already at +5.2% above entry, ~2% below CMP. Optimal trail."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 121.00,
      "reasoning": "Hedge position, slightly underwater, SL appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1730.00,
      "reasoning": "SL 1730 already +1.8% above entry — locked in profit. Trail-gap to CMP 1757 = 1.5%, within tolerance."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 4540.00,
      "reasoning": "P&L +1.2%, below trail trigger. SL appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 6905.00,
      "reasoning": "Move SL to breakeven+ at +2.2% unrealized."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 830.00,
      "reasoning": "P&L only +0.86%, below trail trigger."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 363.00,
      "reasoning": "Effectively flat on entry; SL appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 815.00,
      "reasoning": "Below trail trigger; ATH breakout thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1253.00,
      "reasoning": "Tighten toward breakeven on +1.6% gain after Q4 blockbuster."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 2990.00,
      "reasoning": "Below trail trigger."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 800.00,
      "reasoning": "Tighten 5pts toward breakeven."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "AUROPHARMA, BHARATFORG, DABUR, HINDPETRO, VEDL, M&M, CHOLAHLDNG, NEULANDLAB, SRF, GABRIEL, POLYCAB, LUPIN, LAURUSLABS, HDFCBANK observed but not actioned. Book is already at high deployment (~80%+) across Capital Goods (HAL, GRSE, TITAGARH), Financials (PNBHOUSING, ABCAPITAL, CAMS), Services (ADANIPORTS), Chemicals (NAVINFLUOR), IT (COFORGE), FMCG (MARICO), Hedge (GOLDBEES). Adding more on extended tape (broad +1.2% rally, pharma/auto +5-10% sector moves) is FOMO-stacking. LAURUSLABS ex-div tomorrow — binary event blocks new entry per rule 11. CAMS/COFORGE were post-Q4 entries already taken; further size would be cluster-stack.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Cumulative experiment P&L -53.72% — capital preservation paramount. 5-day rolling win rate 14% with profit factor 0.9x signals strategy is barely profitable; do NOT add risk. Today's entries (all 0 days old) are working — focus on TRAILING winners not adding new names. Stale HFCL MIS BUY from prior session needs operational attention (cannot cancel via this schema). Sector exposure: Capital Goods cluster (HAL+GRSE+TITAGARH ~12% of capital) is at the cluster soft cap — NO new defense/cap-goods adds today. Financials cluster (PNBHOUSING+ABCAPITAL+CAMS) similarly at limit. Cash buffer remains adequate. Letting positions work is the right disposition; resisting the urge to chase extended gap-ups (COFORGE +11%, TITAGARH +9.8%, CAMS +10.5%) where I'm already long."
}
